title: ActuationControlEventArchetype (GSM v1)
description: EventArchetype specialization for actuation commands (Controller → Actuator). Cybernetic flow step 2: Controller's Effector emits a mutation intent that the Actuator's Receptor receives and executes. SIE-seeded: one instance per tenant, reused across all Actuations. The payload schema is defined by the ActuationControlEvent seed.

schema.description: Must reference the ActuationControlEvent payload schema (sie://schemas/events/v1/ActuationControlEvent.json).

x-sie-seed.autoDerivation: Derived by Definition Manager when Rule body contains sys.create/modify/delete/acquire calls.
